themes.theme: Iran geopolitical tensions lifting oil, yields, and safe-haven demand
Central bank super-week anticipation (Fed, BoJ, ECB, BoE) keeping markets cautious
USD softness despite higher yields as geopolitical uncertainty clouds outlook
JPY firming on BoJ decision anticipation and safe-haven flows

key_observation: The Dollar is weakening despite rising yields and Iran-driven oil inflation fears, suggesting markets are pricing in Fed dovishness or geopolitical capital flight risk rather than a traditional rates-support bid.
watch: BoJ policy decision – any hawkish shift on inflation guidance could accelerate USD/JPY downside and amplify broader USD weakness
